amendment.description: An amendment numbered 47 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to add "soda" to the definition of ineligible items and defines soda as a carbonated beverage containing more than 1 gram of added sugar, artificial sweetener, or flavoring per serving.
amendment.purpose: Amendment sought to add "soda" to the definition of ineligible items and defines soda as a carbonated beverage containing more than 1 gram of added sugar, artificial sweetener, or flavoring per serving.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Self amendment (A028) Failed by recorded vote: 186 - 238 (Roll no. 151).

action.text: House amendment not agreed to: On agreeing to the Self amendment (A028) Failed by recorded vote: 186 - 238 (Roll no. 151).
Roll call votes on amendments in House
